summary: Completed testing of 3-tier Lottery System feature. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified - 3 prizes display, admin modal with 3 inputs, countdown section shows dynamic prizes, medals (🥇🥈🥉) display correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: SetPrizeRequest model correctly requires premio_1, premio_2, premio_3 fields
POST /api/admin/lottery/set-prize correctly saves all 3 prizes to lottery_prizes collection
GET /api/lottery/current-prize returns all 3 prizes (premio_1, premio_2, premio_3)
GET /api/lottery/status returns vincitori array with per-winner premio field and top-level premio_1/premio_2/premio_3
POST /api/admin/lottery/extract-winner extracts 3 DISTINCT winners with pool deduplication
Frontend premi.tsx correctly displays 3 prizes with gold/silver/bronze medals
Admin modal 'Imposta Premi' has 3 separate input fields for 1st/2nd/3rd prizes
seed_data_creation: Test prizes created: TEST_UI_Gold_Prize, TEST_UI_Silver_Prize, TEST_UI_Bronze_Prize for current month
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-tier lottery system fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/admin/lottery/set-prize (3 prizes), GET /api/lottery/current-prize (returns 3 prizes), GET /api/lottery/status (vincitori array with per-winner premio), POST /api/admin/lottery/extract-winner (extracts 3 distinct winners), POST /api/admin/lottery/mark-prize-collected/{mese}/{posizione} (posizione 1-3), GET /api/lottery/winners (vincitori array with per-winner data). Frontend: Premi tab shows 3 prizes with medals, admin modal has 3 input fields, countdown section shows dynamic prizes.
tested_features: GET /api/lottery/status - returns vincitori array with per-winner premio field
GET /api/lottery/winners - returns vincitori array with per-winner data
Frontend: Premi tab shows 3 prizes in 'PREMI IN PALIO' card with gold/silver/bronze medals
Frontend: Admin 'Imposta Premi' modal with 3 separate input fields
Frontend: Saving 3 prizes from admin modal calls API correctly
Frontend: Countdown section shows dynamic prizes from API
Frontend: '3 VINCITORI!! Il Maestro è buono e vi vuole bene!' message displays
